# Schmidt Construction

> Family-owned general contractor serving Omaha, Nebraska since 1976. Specializing in retaining walls, concrete, drainage, and remodeling.

## Services

- Retaining Wall Installation: https://www.schmidt-construction.com/retaining-wall-installation
- Block Retaining Walls: https://www.schmidt-construction.com/block-retaining-wall
- Timber Retaining Walls: https://www.schmidt-construction.com/timber-retaining-wall
- Commercial Retaining Walls: https://www.schmidt-construction.com/commercial-retaining-wall
- Drainage Solutions: https://www.schmidt-construction.com/drainage-solutions
- Concrete Work: https://www.schmidt-construction.com/concrete-contractor
- Kitchen Remodeling: https://www.schmidt-construction.com/kitchen-remodeling
- Bathroom Remodeling: https://www.schmidt-construction.com/bathroom-remodeling

## Company

- Founded: 1976
- Licensed & Insured
